political.s: FEC: $21K PAC donations; 74% to Republican, 26% to Democratic committees.

charity.s: $30M reported corporate giving in 2024 (~0.05% of revenue) via Tyson Foods Charitable Giving.
charity.focus: Food insecurity, hunger relief, rural food access

environment.s: water pollution violation: $35.6M in federal penalties (Violation Tracker).

animals.s: No published farm-animal welfare policy or reporting per BBFAW 2024. FAIRR Protein Producer Index: High risk on antibiotic stewardship, climate disclosure, and worker safety. [BBFAW Tier 6 · FAIRR High risk]

execPay.s: CEO-to-median-worker pay ratio 798:1 — SEC proxy statement (DEF 14A, 2025).

wiki.extract: Tyson Foods, Inc. is an American multinational corporation based in Springdale, Arkansas that operates in the food industry. The company is the world's second-largest processor and marketer of chicken, beef, and pork after JBS S.A. It is the largest meat company in America. It annually exports the largest percentage of beef out of the United States. Together with its subsidiaries, it operates major food brands, including Tyson, Jimmy Dean, Hillshire Farm, Ball Park, Wright Brand, Aidells, and State Fair.

fec.committeeName: TYSON FOODS INC POLITICAL ACTION COMMITTEE (TYPAC)

sec.note: Pay ratio extracted from proxy filing — verify manually for accuracy

health.s: FSIS Class-I recalls — multiple in past 24 months (foreign material, Listeria, undeclared allergen). CDC AR Threats: Tyson reintroduced antibiotics in chicken (2023). Sources: cdc-ar-meat, usda-fsis-recalls.

governance.s: Wikidata: owned by S&P 500; HQ Springdale. (Wikidata Q1325987)

sampleRecords.event_description: Struck by running powered equipment  during maintenance, cleaning, testing
sampleRecords.final_narrative: An employee was removing product from a leg quarter saw with a hook when the hook became jammed. As he was getting the hook free, his right hand came into contact with the saw, which partially amputated his middle finger.

sampleRecords.event_description: Caught or wedged between objects  nonrunning
sampleRecords.final_narrative: An employee was standing at a workstation, preparing to hang poultry. The employee reached to close a manual air damper for an air vent, which caught their left middle finger as it closed. The employee suffered an amputation to the fingertip.

An employee was unloading cattle from a pen to the main drive alley. While the employee was inside the pen, a cow rammed her and knocked her down. The employee sustained a contusion to her right upper torso and three fractured ribs.

sampleRecords.event_description: Caught, entangled in running powered equipment  normal operation
sampleRecords.final_narrative: An employee was waiting for test product to come out of a freezer. While the employee was lowering the basket used to catch the test product, their left little finger was caught between the basket and the side shield on the freezer slide chute, resulting in an amputation to the fingertip.

sampleRecords.event_description: Struck by running powered equipment  during maintenance, cleaning, testing
sampleRecords.final_narrative: An employee was observing a cyclone machine. His right hand was caught inside the machine by the rotating motion of the airlock valve cycling inside the casing, resulting in the amputation of four fingers.
